Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Jul-23-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Attys. RONALD H. BAE, Esq. and OLIVIA D. SCHARRER, Esq. of Aequitas Legal Group (Tel: 213-674-6080) for plaintiff Mary Alfardi;
Atty. WILLIAM R.H. MOSHER, Esq. of Fisher & Phillips, LLP (Tel: 916-210-0383) for defendant Covenant Aviation Security, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT COVENANT AVIATION SECURITY, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration.

Matter called.

The Court provides the parties a copy of its tentative ruling, and passes the matter.

Matter re-called.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Covenant Aviation Security, LLC's motion to compel arbitration is denied.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
